description_long: This is a long, industrial-style ladder constructed primarily from metal, featuring a rectangular frame with evenly spaced horizontal rungs. The ladder is supported by robust side rails and reinforced with cross-bracing for added stability. Its design includes a series of square or rectangular footings at the base, likely to provide secure placement on flat surfaces. The rungs are flat and wide, suitable for safe climbing, and the overall structure appears to be fixed or modular, possibly intended for use in maintenance or access scenarios in urban environments. The metallic finish is matte gray, suggesting a galvanized or powder-coated steel construction for durability. There are no visible handrails or additional safety features such as anti-slip feet or locking mechanisms.
description: A long, industrial metal ladder with rectangular side rails and evenly spaced flat rungs, finished in matte gray. The structure is robust and designed for secure placement on flat surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow end of the ladder with visible rungs and sturdy footings.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length, multiple rungs, and the rectangular frame structure.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, highlighting the rungs and base supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the length, rungs, and the open frame design.
